info.name: Adobe Experience Cloud Adobe Campaign API
Profiles
Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud List Profiles

params.name: _lineCount
params.description: Maximum number of profiles to return per page.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of subscriber profiles in the Adobe Campaign database. Profiles can be filtered by email, first name, last name, and custom attributes using query parameters.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Profile

items.docs: Creates a new subscriber profile in the Adobe Campaign database with the provided attributes including email, first name, last name, and any custom fields.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Profile

params.name: profilePKey
params.description: The primary key of the profile.

items.docs: Retrieves a single subscriber profile by its primary key (PKey), including all standard and custom attributes.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Update a Profile

items.docs: Updates specific attributes of an existing subscriber profile using a partial update. Only the fields provided in the request body will be modified.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Delete a Profile

items.docs: Permanently deletes a subscriber profile from the Adobe Campaign database. This action cannot be undone.

info.name: Default
Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud List Services

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of subscription services configured in Adobe Campaign. Services represent mailing lists or subscription topics that profiles can subscribe to.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Service

items.docs: Creates a new subscription service in Adobe Campaign with the specified name, label, and configuration.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Service

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a subscription service by its primary key.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Subscribe a Profile to a Service

items.docs: Subscribes an existing profile to the specified subscription service by providing the profile primary key.

info.name: Workflows
Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud List Workflows

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of workflows configured in Adobe Campaign. Each workflow includes its ID, label, status, and schedule information.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Workflow

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a single workflow by its primary key, including its activities, transitions, and execution history.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Execute a Workflow Command

items.docs: Executes a command on a workflow such as start, pause, resume, or stop. The command triggers the corresponding state transition in the workflow execution engine.

info.name: Transactional Messages
Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Send a Transactional Message

items.docs: Triggers a real-time transactional message to a recipient. Transactional messages are used for event-driven communications such as order confirmations, password resets, and shipping notifications.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Get Transactional Message Status

params.name: eventId
params.description: The event ID returned when the message was triggered.

items.docs: Retrieves the delivery status of a previously sent transactional message by its event ID.

info.name: Metadata
Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud List Resource Metadata

items.docs: Returns metadata about the available custom resources and their fields in the Adobe Campaign data model. Useful for discovering extended profile attributes and custom resource schemas.

info.name: Content
Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud List Email Deliveries

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of email deliveries including their subject, status, and scheduling metadata.

info.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Get an Email Delivery

items.docs: Retrieves the full details of an email delivery by its primary key, including the subject, HTML content, sender, and delivery status.
